accepted_risks.description: resolveCollisions() in game.js:231-234 hardcodes 32 and 13 instead of using TILE_SIZE and GRID_SIZE constants
accepted_risks.recommendation: Replace hardcoded 32 with TILE_SIZE and 13 with GRID_SIZE

accepted_risks.description: spawnEnemyQueue() in enemy.js receives rng parameter but never calls its methods
accepted_risks.recommendation: Remove unused rng parameter or use it for spawn point randomization
